

Welcome to the module on the Contrast Phenomenon.



We’ll start off by talking about how setting up contrasts can make you more persuasive. 



The Contrast Phenomenon allows you to change the way people experience anything by shaping what they experience first. 



Given this, it can be used to amplify any of the Principles of Persuasion.



Click the “continue” to move on to the next lesson where we will review an example of contrast by examining the work of an ad executive named Rosser Reeves.
